raw_text:
ERROR   [TC-C-002] interface.f90:5 <-> header.h:2  param[0] 'count'
  VALUE_MISMATCH: Fortran 'count' has VALUE attribute (receives copy of int).
  C prototype passes 'int *count' (8-byte pointer). Fortran reads the low 32
  bits of the pointer address as the integer value. Silent wrong result;
  increment is lost; caller's variable never updated.
